abilities: * laugh * Is that all you've got?
That's all your robot suit can do? (blocking D.Va 's Self-Destruct)
Haha! Victory reigns from below! (blocking Pharah 's Barrage)
Aren't you dizzy from all that spinning? (blocking Reaper 's Death Blossom)
My barrier won't hold much longer!
The barrier can't take much more!
Oh, this armor really needs more padding...
chatter: Together, we'll strike them down!
A fine day for charging and hitting things!
As Balderich always said: "Together, we are stronger than..." Ah... I forget the rest. But it was so inspiring!
I was napping. Did anyone read the mission brief?
I'll protect you, friends.
Reinhardt is the name, glory is the game!
Ha! They always think they can beat me. And I always prove them wrong!
Let's chop them into Currywurst!
Where's my lucky hammer? Ah, I'm holding it!
Who's ready to have some fun?
Uh... perhaps some of us should have guns? No? (with all heroes without guns on the team)
Ha! Who needs guns? Let's show them that the classics can still get it done! (with all heroes without guns on the team)
*laugh* Let's show these kids how it's done. (with only veteran/old heroes on the team)
Ah, Talon! Still the only criminals foolish enough to battle Overwatch on purpose! (with only Talon members on the team)
Ana! Jack! My old friends! This is going to be delightful. (with Ana and Soldier: 76 on the team)
Back in my day we had to fight on the ground. (with Echo and Pharah on the team)
A flower man and a sun woman? We're a pile of dirt away from a nice garden! (with Illari and Lifeweaver on the team)
Doot doot doodly doo! Such rousing tunes. Thank you, music man! (with Lúcio on the team)
Don't worry, my friends, I will be your shield!
Forward, my friends!
Forward with courage!
Hold fast! Do not let them through!
I'm looking forward to this!
Let's show them our strength!
Stand strong, we will not fall!
This victory has our name on it!
Victory is in our hands!
Victory is so close I can taste it!
Dust yourselves off, friends. This isn't the end!
If we give this everything we've got, we may have a chance!
My friends, now is not the time to give up! Let us show them our mettle.
We are not beaten yet. We can still win this!
This is our moment, let us seize it!
This is the final fight. Let's do whatever it takes!
This is where the fight ends. Make it count!
This will be decided with a trial by combat!
I can take more than that!
*laughs* I will never tire of this!
I'm not through just yet!
My journey continues.
Pah! I've been knocked down before.
* laughs * Still kicking!
The battle awaits me!
There is no challenge I cannot face!
There is still more to my tale!
What's next?
Ana's right. A trip to Fiji would be just the ticket. (with an ally Ana on your team)
If Lindholm says one word, I swear! (with an ally Brigitte or Torbjörn on your team)
Maybe I taught her too well... (when killed by a Brigitte )
If Torbjörn is on my team, then how is he also on the other team, shooting at me?! (when killed by a Torbjörn with another Torbjörn on your team)
Oh, Winston, my friend. You are going to pay for that. (when killed by a Winston )
At least I took a lot of them with me... (multi kill)
Ahh, that's okay. We won the fight! (team kill)
Ah! When are my friends coming back?
I can't do this on my own. I mean, I could... but I don't want to.
The others are taking their time, I see!
Ah, I feel like a new man!
Much better.
*sigh*
Can you feel the heat?!
I'm feeling the burn!
I'm on fire!
I am on fire! Come face me!
You can't stop me! I'm on fire!
A change of pace.
I'll make good use of this!
Let's see what this can do.
*laugh* Much improved.
A fitting reward!
Now this is more like it!
Old dog, new trick.
Yes! Wunderbar!
Much obliged.
Thank you, my friend!
You've come to my aid again!
Thank you, squire! (healed by Brigitte )
Let me at them!
Let's fight!
YES!
You honor me!
Damn!
Unacceptable.
Huh? What did I miss?
I'm back!
*laugh* You thought that would stop me?
Enemy is back for more!
Enemy is back in the fight.
Watch out, they're already back in the fight.
What? They're back already?!
Ally Ultimate Remark
Ah! Impressive! If I do say so myself.
That's how it's done.
To see justice done is its own reward!
Wonderful!
I am the champion.
What a performance!
call-outs: Haha! Let's show them why it doesn't pay to be the enemy!
I have found the enemy. Come and face me!
Time for a fight. Make me proud!
We are fewer in number, but greater in spirit!
Come out! Are you afraid to face me?
Are you ready? Here I come!
Hold fast! They will not breach our defense.
Just a little longer! Bear down!
Stand your ground and win the day!
Make every second count! Crush their defenses!
Our time grows short, but we will not falter!
This is our final stand! Onward!
We are out of time. Attack!
We don't have much time. Push forward!
eliminations: Ha! And that is why I still fight!
Any regrets?
By all means, try again!
Down you go!
Feel my power!
Give me more!
Glorious, if I do say so myself!
Hardly broke a sweat.
I feel great!
I'm just getting started!
Knocked you off your feet!
Maybe you should have stepped back!
No guts, no glory.
One step closer to victory.
That looked like it hurt!
That's what happens when you get too close.
You've been bested!
Try firing more bullets next time! (eliminating Bastion )
You can do better than that, Brigitte. (eliminating Brigitte )
That is today's lesson! (eliminating Brigitte )
I slay dragons. (eliminating Hanzo )
And I'd win in a shouting match, too! (eliminating Hazard )
Better luck next time, young man! (eliminating Hazard )
Your sun had barely risen...* sigh * (eliminating Illari )
Me-ouch! (eliminating Jetpack Cat )
*laughs* A smash hit! (eliminating Lúcio )
Now you were a worthy challenge. (eliminating Mauga )
Mei-be you should sit this fight out! (eliminating Mei )
Still think I'm too old for this? (eliminating Mercy )
For Balderich ! (eliminating Orisa )
Traitor! (eliminating Reaper )
Retire that! (eliminating Sojourn )
I honor my vow. Why don't you? (eliminating Soldier: 76 )
Whose armor needs fixing now? (eliminating Torbjörn )
Not strong enough. (eliminating Zarya )
Do I have your attention yet?
Even hotter up close!
Fresh from the oven!
Splendid.
Mmm. Toasted!
Thought you were out of reach? Pah!
All in one shot! (multi elimination)
Haha! How many was that? (multi elimination)
Burned out of the sky! (eliminating airborne enemy)
Choose Reinhardt for long-range destruction! (long-range elimination)
I am basically a sniper! (long-range elimination)
Ha! That was a bold move! (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
I am a Weltmeister of prediction. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
No platform can save you — no matter how pretty! (eliminating Lifeweaver using Petal Platform)
You're fired, Reyes! Haha! (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom)
Ha! End of the line.
Take that!
Boom! Haha! You were saying? (eliminating enemy using ultimate)
Gah! Cancelled! (eliminating enemy using ultimate)
Ha! Interrupted! (eliminating enemy using ultimate)
Gah! Shut down! (eliminating enemy using ultimate)
Rally's over! (eliminating Brigitte using Rally)
Careful where you wave that sword! (eliminating Genji using Dragonblade)
What is that, a toothpick?! (eliminating Genji using Dragonblade)
Nobody likes your lava, Torbjörn! (eliminating Torbjörn using Molten Core)
Deep breaths, Winston. (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
Even Zaryanova couldn't save you! (eliminating enemy while protected by Projected Barrier)
And stay down!
Don't bother getting up.
*laughs* Got you!
It's over for you!
No lying down on the job!
Ha! That's what I thought.
That's what you get for challenging me!
Another one for me! Torbjörn, you're losing this bet! (with Torbjörn on the team)
A close shave! (on low HP)
Back down to Earth! (eliminating airborne)
Like swatting a fly with a hammer! (eliminating airborne)
How's that for "old man reflexes?" (eliminating enemy using movement ability)
Keep popping back up! I don't mind! (eliminating resurrected enemy)
What a powerful brawl! (eliminating Nano-Boosted tank)
When they're jumping around a lot, I find it best to just swing the hammer. (eliminating airborne enemy)
Not quite, Genji. Not quite! (eliminating Genji using Dragonblade)
No space beams allowed! (eliminating Juno with unknown trigger, probably Orbital Ray)
Sorry, Angela! (eliminating Mercy using Valkyrie)
Bonk, bonk, bonk! (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom)
Uh oh... that's going to get me a citation! (eliminating Sojourn using Overclock)
See, Jack? A hammer is better than a gun! (eliminating Soldier: 76 using Tactical Visor)
Looks like you've been recalled--to orbit! Ha ha! (eliminating Tracer using Recall)
Oh, Torbjörn, I'll never let you live that down! (eliminating Torbjörn using Molten Core)
Black hole or no, I'm still swinging! (eliminating Zarya using Graviton Surge)
You spoil me with these shields, Zaryanova! (while protected by Projected Barrier)
Anyone else?
I will never stop fighting!
I will take them all on!
More glory to my name!
The fight has just begun!
They fall like dominos!
*laughs* Unstoppable.
Oh, Ana, it's like we never left! (when Nano-Boosted by Ana )
A mere hack will not stop me! (while hacked by Sombra )
*laughs* Anyone else?
Hardly a fair fight!
I'll take you all on!
The bonkening of the century! (eliminating knocked down enemy)
The ultimate bonk! (eliminating knocked down enemy, when Nano-Boosted by Ana )
Such speed! How glorious! *laughs* (while assisted by Kiriko 's Kitsune Rush, or Lúcio 's Amp It Up)
Such chaos! These Junkers are rubbing off on me. *chuckle* (on New Junk City , with Junkrat , Junker Queen or Roadhog on the team. Junkertown mistakenly excluded from criteria)
That was all of them?! I was just getting warmed up.
Ah! The enemy team is eliminated! We have the advantage!
Ha! Where did they all go?!
An eye for an eye.
This is payback!
Got you back, Junker! (eliminating Junker Queen , Junkrat or Roadhog )
Don't thank me. Put it on my tab.
I would never let you fall!
You aren't in this fight alone!
Like old times, right, Captain? (to Ana )
We stand together, my squire! (to Brigitte )
Express delivery to certain doom!
Land on something soft!
There they go!
Ha! They went flying!
Enemy turret destroyed.
A commendable hit!
Didn't that feel fantastic?!
I am filled with pride!
Well done, my friend!
You earned the glory for that one!
You show great valor!
I taught her that. * laughs* (to Brigitte )
Well struck, Brigitte! (to Brigitte )
Ana would be proud. (to Pharah )
Your mother would approve. (to Pharah )
Well done, my diminutive Swedish friend! (to Torbjörn )
A feat for the ages, my friend! (to Venture )
interactions: Ana : Reinhardt, how have you been? Reinhardt : Terrible. Every moment without you watching over me has been agony! Ana : *laughs* You're so dramatic, you!

Reinhardt : Ana, what has been going on in Egypt ? It sounds... serious. Ana : Just a few ghosts I'm laying to rest. It's nothing to worry about. Reinhardt : I always worry, Ana. But I trust you're doing what's right.

Ana : You answered Winston's recall. Even after all you went through... Reinhardt : *sigh* If I am called, and I do not answer... what is left, Ana? Ana : You are left, Reinhardt. And that is nothing to scoff at.
Reinhardt : Ana... when we work together, we are unstoppable! Ana : You don't have to shout, Reinhardt. I'm right here.

Ana Oh, Gibraltar... where has the time gone? Reinhardt : Do you remember that night? Dancing in the command center until dawn? Ana : We were foolish, weren't we? Reinhardt : Perhaps we still are. *chuckles*
Reinhardt : Stay behind me! I will keep you safe! Ashe : Heh, thanks. But I already have a bodyguard.
Ashe : That's a lot of armor. Though I guess you are a pretty big target. Reinhardt : Aha! I guess I am!
Baptiste : It might be a tall order, but want to try taking fewer hits this time? Reinhardt : Complaining, already? This is what you're paid for! Baptiste : *laughs* I'm getting paid?
Reinhardt : Where did a medic like you learn to handle a weapon like that? Baptiste : The number of battlefields I've seen, I was bound to pick something up.
Reinhardt : Let's attack the enemy from the front and take them by surprise! Bastion : *worried beeps* Reinhardt : You hear that? Bastion agrees with me! Bastion : *panicky beeps*
Reinhardt : I killed many of your kind here , Bastion. Bastion : *timid beeps*

Reinhardt : Brigitte, isn't it time to size up your armor? It's been ages! Brigitte : I'm not getting any taller. Reinhardt : What? Why not? Aim to be as huge as me! Brigitte : Considering Papa, I'm already a lot taller than expected.

Brigitte : Reinhardt, do you think I should get a helmet? Reinhardt : Do you intend to be struck in the head? Brigitte : I hope not. Reinhardt : Then why bother? You'll just miss the wind blowing in your hair.
Reinhardt : My elbow servo isn't actuating! Gah, that's annoying. Brigitte! Brigitte : No point in fixing it now, you'll probably just mess it up again!
Reinhardt : Twice as many Lindholms as I'm used to! Brigitte : But still the same amount of Reinhardt. Torbjörn : Maybe too much.

Reinhardt : How are the grandkids, Torbjörn? Brigitte : Do Astrid and Alma still wanna be firefighters when they grow up? Torbjörn : Last I heard, they'd decided to be artists, like their father. Reinhardt : Ah, yes. That creative Lindholm spark!
Reinhardt : How are the grandkids, Torbjörn? Torbjörn : Lucas has gotten so big, you wouldn't believe it. *chuckles* The twins pull him into all their pranks! Brigitte : Oh, no. Their poor cat!

Venture : This place is incredible! Ah, I wish I knew more Medieval history. Reinhardt : Perhaps I could regale you with the time-honored tales of a brave knight and his noble squire! Venture : No way! Tell me, tell me! Brigitte : Just make sure you do some fact-checking when he's done.

Cassidy : I hear a lot of folks say "chivalry is dead", but I'm glad to see it's alive 'n well with you, partner. Reinhardt : And look at you, making the old west young again! Cassidy : *chuckles* Oh, I think I've seen too many sunsets to call myself young. Reinhardt : Young or old, I'll be proud to chase the next one by your side!

(2 out of the 5 following heroes must also be on the team: Baptiste , D.Va , Echo , Pharah or Zarya ) Reinhardt : Look at these fresh faces! What do we owe you for bringing them in, Cole? Cassidy : Don't care to keep a ledger these days. Heh. What do you say we call it settled? Reinhardt : Deal! It is an honor just to fight at their side. Cassidy : *chuckles* Couldn't agree more, old timer.
D.Va : Why so serious, Reinhardt? You're supposed to be the fun one! Reinhardt : What? I am gloriously fun! D.Va : Why stop at "glorious"? Be "notorious"! Reinhardt : Ha ha, you got it!

Reinhardt : You're awfully far from home. Do you miss your friends? D.Va : Yeah. But the squad is doing great on their own! Besides, I have new friends here. Including you! Reinhardt : Wonderful! We should have a game night! I will bring the snacks!
Reinhardt : Ha ha! Now that's what I call a Shatter-Bomb! D.Va : Um, I think you mean... "bomb-shatter"!
D.Va : Massive bomb-shatter! Reinhardt : I still say... "shatter-bomb" has a better ring to it.
Kiriko: Genji, remember the time you tripped over your sword in training? Reinhardt: What?! Haha! Hahahahaha! Genji: It only happened once. Kiriko: Once was enough.

Hazard : What a getup. Do you believe in fairytales as well? Reinhardt : Of course! A little fantasy never hurt anyone. Hazard : Oh, I beg to differ. Lot of dark tales where I'm from. Reinhardt : Then it's a good thing we have knights to keep the darkness at bay!
Reinhardt : The battle ahead will be perilous. Sharpen those claws, Fika! Jetpack Cat : *contented meows* Reinhardt : Or perhaps our enemies will change their ways when they see how cute you are.

Reinhardt : A cat? In a jetpack?! Heh heh, you've got to be... "catting" me! *laughter* Jetpack Cat : *confused meows* (one of two): Mercy : Reinhardt... I do believe it's 'kitten' me. Wuyang : Uh... shouldn't it be 'kitten' me? (one of two): Brigitte : Ugh, trust me. I've already tried. Reinhardt : Don't be ridiculous. She's not a baby!
Junkrat : How many of you Overwatch people are missing an eye? Reinhardt : I don't need two eyes to swing a hammer!

Junkrat: Mr. Wilhelm, I'm working on me résumé. What sounds better: "itinerant scoundrel," or "perspicacious rapscallion"? Reinhardt: *chuckle* Is there room for both? Junkrat: I knew you were the right bloke to ask! Haha!
Juno : If you are a knight... should I call you Sir Wilhelm? Reinhardt : *laughs* Yes! Finally, someone who understands!

Juno : Sir Wilhelm... How do you remain brave in combat? I cannot stop shaking! Reinhardt : Half of courage is might, my Martian friend. Juno : Intriguing! But... I do not feel particularly... mighty... Reinhardt : Don't fret. Stand with me, and you'll have nothing to fear!
Kiriko: You look familiar. Are you the loud one? Reinhardt: No, I am Reinhardt Wilhelm! The one with the hammer and shield! Kiriko: But not the loud one. Sure.

Kiriko: Hammer Man! Any German music you recommend? Reinhardt: Krankenwagen Grün . Haha, the best band of the 2030's! Kiriko: Never heard of them. Reinhardt: What? They defined Techno-polka! You young people have no culture at all.
Lifeweaver : How on earth are you even larger than I thought you'd be? Reinhardt : That's simple! You see, I am standing very close to you. Lifeweaver : And I'd like it to remain that way!

Lifeweaver : You're so old-fashioned, Reinhardt. A hammer? How marvelous! Reinhardt : I suppose you think I should have a giant laser gun. Lifeweaver : No! Lean into it! Get Lindholm to build you one of his big robotic horses ! (if Cassidy is on the team): Cassidy : ...What did you just say?
Reinhardt : You kids today with your techno music. You should enjoy the classics, like Hasselhoff! Lúcio : I can't even take you seriously right now.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Reinhardt : I identify with the noble rhinoceros! Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mauga : *groan* Man, I'm starving. Reinhardt : Starving for justice? Mauga : Gah, I'm allergic to that.
Mauga : Gonna enjoy filling that shield with bullets. Reinhardt : Ugh. Can't you wait until after this mission? Mauga : Don't worry. Heh, just thinking ahead.
Mauga : *chuckles* That armor of yours could use some bullet holes. Reinhardt : And your confidence could use some pounding with my hammer!
Mei : Oh, I feel like I'm forgetting something. Reinhardt : All you need for battle is your heart and your head. Mei : What about a hammer and shield? Reinhardt : *laughs* Bonuses!
Mei : Please be careful where you're swinging, Reinhardt... almost hit Snowball last time! Reinhardt : *embarrassed chuckle* My apologies, Snowball. Sometimes my hammer is quicker than my head!
Mercy : *sigh* Reinhardt, answering the Recall is not my idea of "hanging it up." Reinhardt : I had to show! Otherwise, your life would be far too easy! Mercy : And what a shame that would be.

Reinhardt : Moira! I should crush you like a bug for what you've done! Moira : Did you know that certain centipedes kill prey fifteen times their size? Reinhardt : What are you saying? Moira : I'm advising my prey not to test me.

Reinhardt : Orisa! I heard you took down Null Sector. You've gotten strong! Orisa : Thank you. Do you truly believe so? Reinhardt : Of course! Not quite as strong as I am, but you're getting there! Orisa : *chuckle* We will see about that!
Pharah : Reinhardt, you know, I had a poster of you on my wall when I was younger. Reinhardt : I remember the poster. My hair was amazing.
Reinhardt: Putting those vile helmets on your own kind ... Have you no honor? Ramattra: I will not sacrifice my kind to abide by humanity's moral code.
Reinhardt : That chill in the air... it seems death walks among us! Reaper : Maybe you're just haunted. Reinhardt : Oh, I hope so. I'd love to fight off a ghost!
Reinhardt : Great work! Mostly me, though. Reaper : Look who finally found a way to contribute.
Sojourn : I'll be watching your back out there, lieutenant. Reinhardt : You have nothing to worry about, Captain. I'm sure Brigitte could give you some pointers! (if Brigitte is on the team)
Soldier: 76 : Back to playing the hero? Reinhardt : I never stopped. Unlike you. Soldier: 76 : The world doesn't want us, Wilhelm. At least I can realize that.

Reinhardt : Sombra, something is wrong with my phone. It is so slow! Sombra : I'm not tech support, big guy. Reinhardt : I know, I know. I'm just not very good with computers. Sombra : *sigh* Have you tried turning it off and on?
Torbjörn : Brigitte isn't meddling too much with your armor, is she? Reinhardt : Somebody's worried he's turning obsolete. Torbjörn : That's parenthood for you.

Reinhardt : How are the grandkids, Torbjörn? Torbjörn : Märta just finished another vampire manuscript. I'm supposed to read it, but... well, you know. Reinhardt : What? I love her stories! Send it to me!

Venture: Do you ever wish you were back in medieval times? Reinhardt: A true knight's valor is timeless, little historian. The world needs us now. Venture: Yeah, cool. *pause* ...But imagine living in a castle, though! Reinhardt: *laughs* I suppose that does sound tempting!

Reinhardt: My life was forever changed in this place. It pains me to see it forgotten. Venture: Will you tell me what happened here? I'll always remember--promise! Reinhardt: It would be an honor, my friend.
Reinhardt : One day, you'll pay for all the crimes you've committed! Widowmaker : You're less handsome when you talk.
Widowmaker : All the armor in the world can't save you from a well-placed bullet. Reinhardt : How do you think your fancy jumpsuit would fare against my hammer?
Winston : I'm so happy you answered the Recall , Reinhardt. Reinhardt : For you, my old friend? *chuckle* Of course.
Winston : Anyone wanna hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Reinhardt : Yes! But I can't promise I'll understand it. Winston : *chuckles*

Reinhardt : Winston! You still haven't told me that joke about the periodic table! Winston : Oh, well... when I asked you were supposed to answer... "Na!" *chuckle* Reinhardt : But why would I say "Na"? I love jokes.

One of three: Reinhardt : What did you do, you know, before the Crisis ? Tracer : Tekhartha Zenyatta? If you don't mind me asking... what did you do before the Crisis? Zarya : What was your function before the Crisis? Zenyatta: I collected payments at a laser tag arena. I was a lifeguard at a water park. I served coffee. I drove a tractor. I massaged sheep on a free-range pasture. One of seven: D.Va: Wait, for real? Doomfist: Is that true? Reinhardt: Hahahaha! Is that true? Roadhog: Really? Sigma: Could that be? Tracer: Seriously? Zarya: Really? One of two: Genji: He won't tell me either. Ramattra: Ha! I don't think so, but he wouldn't tell me, either.
map-specific: What a beautiful day! Let's make the most of it.
It's raining! Can't wait to splash in some puddles.
*shivers* Need a good fight to warm me up.
That was just a warm-up. Brrr! (respawn)
I love car races! High octane, burning rubber! Um... the thrill of the chase! Ooh! Pedal to the metal!
Let's win quickly. I want to hit the beach!
Dying wouldn't be good for my tan. (respawn)
